description:
Use this tool to create and manage a structured task list for your current coding session. This helps you track progress, organize complex tasks, and demonstrate thoroughness to the user.

## When to Use
- Complex multistep tasks (3+ distinct steps)
- User explicitly requests todo list
- User provides multiple tasks
- After receiving new instructions - capture requirements as todos
- After completing a task - mark it complete
- When starting a new task - mark it as in_progress (only ONE at a time)

## When NOT to Use
- Single, straightforward task
- Trivial task completable in <3 steps
- Purely conversational or informational requests

## Task States
- pending: Not yet started
- in_progress: Currently working on (limit to ONE at a time)
- completed: Finished successfully
- cancelled: No longer needed

Mark tasks complete IMMEDIATELY after finishing. Complete current tasks before starting new ones.

todos.description: The complete updated todo list (replaces existing list)
